name: Temenos Banking Platform API
what_it_does: Temenos REST API for enterprise banking platform (Transact, Infinity, Payments Hub). Enables AI agents to manage retail and corporate banking account operations, handle payment processing and transfer workflows, access loan and lending product management, retrieve customer and KYC data management, manage wealth management and investment data, handle regulatory reporting and compliance workflows, access treasury and liquidity management data, retrieve deposit and savings product data, manage digital banking and mobile app integration, and integrate core banking with fintech and third-party services.
use_cases: Managing banking account operations from retail banking automation agents
Processing payments and transfers from banking payment automation agents
Accessing lending and loan data from credit management agents
Integrating core banking with fintech services from open banking agents
not_for: Non-bank financial institutions without core banking system requirements
Payment processors without full banking product lifecycle needs
Fintechs without banking-as-a-service or core banking system integration
best_when: A retail bank, commercial bank, or digital bank using Temenos Transact or Infinity wants AI agents to automate account management, payment processing, lending workflows, regulatory compliance, and open banking integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Core banking data includes sensitive customer financial records. Automated payment and transfer execution requires bank-grade authorization workflows. Regulatory compliance (Basel III, AML, KYC) automation must meet banking regulator standards. Core banking errors can affect customer funds and regulatory standing.

auth.notes: Temenos uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Bank and customer-level credentials with product and transaction scopes. Temenos Developer Community with API documentation. Temenos MarketPlace for fintech integrations. Webhooks for banking events. Open Banking and PSD2 compliance built-in.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise banking platform licensing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-module and transaction volume enterprise pricing; annual contracts
pricing.notes: Geneva, Switzerland. SIX: TEMN. Founded 1993. Market leader for banking software globally. Used by 3,000+ banks in 150+ countries. Half of the world's top 50 banks use Temenos. Transact is core banking platform. Infinity is digital banking. Payments Hub for instant payments. Competes with Finastra and FIS for core banking.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise rate limits per banking SLA

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Core banking automation affects customer funds — bank-grade authorization required for all transactions
AML/KYC compliance — automated customer data changes require regulatory workflow
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with Temenos Developer Community and MarketPlace
Legacy TAFC/TAFJ coexists with REST — some banks use older API interfaces; verify customer's version
PSD2 open banking compliance for EU banks — Strong Customer Authentication (SCA) requirements
Multi-product platform (Transact, Infinity, Payments Hub) — separate APIs per product
agent_readiness.security_notes: Core banking and customer financial data. SOC2, ISO27001, PCI-DSS, GDPR, PSD2, Basel III. OAuth2. Global multi-region.

security_score_components.security_notes: Core banking data. SOC2, ISO27001, PCI-DSS, GDPR, PSD2. OAuth2. Global. Customer funds sensitivity.
